title: Fix branding to 'Creative Prints and Design' and restore logo

requirements.summary: Update all UI text from 'cp&d' or abbreviations to 'Creative Prints and Design'
acceptanceCriteria: The header/navbar displays 'Creative Prints and Design' as the app name
The HTML page title (index.html) reads 'Creative Prints and Design'
No instance of 'cp&d' or abbreviated branding appears anywhere in the UI

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag from its current value to 'Creative Prints and Design' to reflect the full brand name in the browser tab.
Replace any abbreviated branding text (e.g., 'cp&d') in the header navigation with 'Creative Prints and Design'. Ensure the brand text next to the logo reads the full name.
Review and update any branding text in the hero section or features grid to use 'Creative Prints and Design' instead of abbreviations.

requirements.summary: Replace header logo with the uploaded circular 3D-printer logo image
acceptanceCriteria: The header displays the circular 3D-printer logo from the uploaded image
The logo renders cleanly at standard navbar height without distortion
The logo links to the home page

file_operations.description: Update the header logo to use the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/creative-prints-logo.dim_256x256.png (as provided in the uploaded asset). Ensure the logo is wrapped in a link to the home page ('/'), has appropriate alt text ('Creative Prints and Design logo'), and is styled to fit the navbar height (e.g., h-10 or h-12) without distortion using object-fit.
